faq.question: Do you offer home delivery?
faq.answer: Yes! All products include home delivery across Pakistan. Typically 3–7 days for in-stock items.

faq.question: Do you offer installation?
faq.answer: Yes — installation is available. Please mention it when placing your order.

faq.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.answer: Bank transfer, Easypaisa, JazzCash, and cash on delivery for in-stock items.

faq.question: Do you offer instalment plans?
faq.answer: Yes — instalment options are available. Ask our team for details.

faq.question: Can I see the furniture in person?
faq.answer: Absolutely! Reply 'visit' or 'showroom' and I'll share directions and opening hours.

faq.question: How do I speak to a real person?
faq.answer: Just say 'real person', 'speak to someone', or 'human' — I'll immediately alert our team.
